message:
Command `# Kill the pipe drain process - no longer needed
kill 257778 257780 2>/dev/null && echo "drain killed" || echo "drain already gone"

# Kill lingering monitoring bash sessions
for pid in 244710; do kill $pid 2>/dev/null; done

echo ""
echo "=== Restarting LibreLane — this time with nohup (session-safe) ==="
echo "Synthesis netlist will be reused (--overwrite restarts, but synthesis completes ~25min)"
echo ""

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

# Run in background with nohup so session timeouts don't kill it
# Direct output to file — no tee pipe that can deadlock
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane started with PID $LR_PID"
echo "Log file: /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
echo "Start time: $(date)"

# Wait a moment and confirm it started
sleep 5
ps -p $LR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "CONFIRMED RUNNING" || echo "FAILED TO START"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
drain already gone

=== Restarting LibreLane — this time with nohup (session-safe) ===
Synthesis netlist will be reused (--overwrite restarts, but synthesis completes ~25min)

LibreLane started with PID 286668
Log file: /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
Start time: Fri May 29 10:37:05 +04 2026
    PID STAT %CPU %MEM     ELAPSED
 286668 Rl   61.6  0.7       00:05
CONFIRMED RUNNING

`$paramod$4b0c3fca237cee07f386c7bfd9d290d1076f1976\opendap_sw_dp.$proc$/nc/apps/
nc_socgen/external/opendap/hdl/opendap_sw_dp.v:78$3228'.                        
Found async reset \rst_n_por in                                                 
`$paramod$a54c1fa0345d79a7ff57c9da41d1070c9ab69178\opendap_mem_ap_apb.$proc$/nc/
apps/nc_socgen/external/opendap/hdl/opendap_mem_ap_apb.v:227$3212'.

extras.command:
# Kill the pipe drain process - no longer needed
kill 257778 257780 2>/dev/null && echo "drain killed" || echo "drain already gone"

# Kill lingering monitoring bash sessions
for pid in 244710; do kill $pid 2>/dev/null; done

echo ""
echo "=== Restarting LibreLane — this time with nohup (session-safe) ==="
echo "Synthesis netlist will be reused (--overwrite restarts, but synthesis completes ~25min)"
echo ""

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

# Run in background with nohup so session timeouts don't kill it
# Direct output to file — no tee pipe that can deadlock
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane started with PID $LR_PID"
echo "Log file: /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
echo "Start time: $(date)"

# Wait a moment and confirm it started
sleep 5
ps -p $LR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "CONFIRMED RUNNING" || echo "FAILED TO START"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
